title: ISS Facility Services India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: ISS Facility Services India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
ISS Facility Services India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ISS Facility Services India:
ISS Facility Services India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India!
